name: Optional Field Addition
description: Backend added new optional field that's not in OpenAPI spec - low severity, backward compatible

backend.implementation: res.json({ productId: 'PROD-123', name: 'Widget Pro', price: 99.99, inStock: true, rating: 4.5 })

frontend.usage: const { productId, name, price } = data; // works fine, ignores extra fields

fields.userImpact: No immediate impact. Frontend ignores new field. Opportunity to enhance UI with stock status if documented.
No immediate impact. Frontend could display product ratings if field is documented and consumed.
